notes: Non-overlapping timing: each clip starts after previous ends. s01-s05, s08, s09 use Liam; s06-s07 use Alice. No overlap verified via silencedetect — first silence at 18.32s. 0:00-0:08 verified clean.
mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i word-cloud-final.webm -i vo/s01.mp3 -i vo/s02.mp3 -i vo/s03.mp3 -i vo/s04.mp3 -i vo/s05.mp3 -i vo/s06.mp3 -i vo/s07.mp3 -i vo/s08.mp3 -i vo/s09.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=7890|7890[a2];[3:a]adelay=10240|10240[a3];[4:a]adelay=14180|14180[a4];[5:a]adelay=18440|18440[a5];[6:a]adelay=24790|24790[a6];[7:a]adelay=28370|28370[a7];[8:a]adelay=37640|37640[a8];[9:a]adelay=41060|41060[a9];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8][a9]amix=inputs=9:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k word-cloud-narrated.webm

steps.display_text: A Word Cloud slide lets participants submit words and phrases, and displays them all on screen — with the most popular growing largest at the centre.
steps.tts_text: A Word Cloud slide lets participants submit words and phrases, and displays them all on screen — with the most popular growing largest at the centre.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Word Cloud from the slide type picker — it's in the Interactive section.
steps.tts_text: Select Word Cloud from the slide type picker — it's in the Interactive section.

steps.display_text: Type the prompt your audience will respond to. A short, open-ended question works best.
steps.tts_text: Type the prompt your audience will respond to. A short, open-ended question works best.

steps.display_text: Choose how many words each participant can submit — from 1 to 10. The default of 3 is a great starting point.
steps.tts_text: Choose how many words each participant can submit — from 1 to 10. The default of 3 is a great starting point.

steps.display_text: Click Preview to see how the cloud looks before you go live.
steps.tts_text: Click Preview to see how the cloud looks before you go live.

steps.display_text: As each response arrives, a new word pops into the cloud in a random colour. The most-submitted word grows biggest and moves to the centre.
steps.tts_text: As each response arrives, a new word pops into the cloud in a random colour. The most-submitted word grows biggest and moves to the centre.

steps.display_text: Exit preview and head back to the editor to fine-tune your settings.
steps.tts_text: Exit preview and head back to the editor to fine-tune your settings.

steps.display_text: That's your Word Cloud slide set up. Hit Present — participants join on their phones and the cloud builds in real time right in front of the whole room.
steps.tts_text: That's your Word Cloud slide set up. Hit Present — participants join on their phones and the cloud builds in real time right in front of the whole room.
